programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Kym Marsh and Gethin Jones host the weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical chat and expert advice

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell checks out a three-bedroom semi in Alvaston, Derby, and a basement flat in Blackpool. Dion Dublin meets the developer who bought a Liverpool terrace

programme.title: Rip Off Britain: Holidays
programme.desc: The music fans stuck with tickets for concerts abroad that were cancelled due to coronavirus, and the static caravan owners whose holiday havens are headed for the junkyard

programme.title: The Moment of Proof
programme.desc: How a distinctive deer stalker hat was the red flag to cracking a web of stolen bank cards. Plus, how one careless text message put a dangerous stalker behind bars for the longest sentence in a police force's history. Narrated by Chuku Modu

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles takes a tour across the UK looking at some of the most memorable glass items bought by competing teams, before seeing how they fared at auction. He also tries his hand at glass cutting and shares his tips when it comes to buying and selling glass. Plus, Natasha Raskin Sharp blows some glass and Roo Irvine discusses her passion for glass with Charlie Ross

programme.title: MOTD Live: UEFA Euro 2020
programme.desc: Sweden v Slovakia (Kick-off 2.00pm). Gabby Logan presents coverage of the second Group E match for both sides, which comes from Saint Petersburg Stadium. These countries have only previously played each other five times, and this is their first meeting at a major tournament finals. Both teams got off to encouraging starts, with Sweden holding Spain to a hard-fought goalless draw despite seeing little of the ball, while the Slovakians earned a 2-1 victory over Poland, with Inter Milan defender Milan Skriniar scoring the winner. Analysis comes from Micah Richards, Alex Scott and Ashley Williams, while Robyn Cowen is the commentator

programme.title: Match of the Day Top 10
programme.desc: Gary Lineker, Alan Shearer and Micah Richards discuss the best goals ever scored at the European Championships

programme.title: MOTD Live: UEFA Euro 2020
programme.desc: Croatia v Czech Republic (Kick-off 5.00pm). Gary Lineker presents coverage of the Group D fixture, which takes place at Hampden Park. Both Gareth Southgate and Steve Clarke will be keeping a close eye on this game, as the result here could have major ramifications for England and Scotland's qualification hopes, with the Czechs looking to build on their victory over Scotland, and Croatia aiming to register their first point after losing to England. The most recent game between the sides - and only the third in history - came during the group stages of Euro 2016 in France. Crowd trouble and flares thrown onto the pitch marred the occasion, which ended in a 2-2 draw in Saint-Etienne. Ivan Perisic and Ivan Rakitic had given Croatia a 2-0 lead, but the Czechs hit back through Milan Skoda's header, before Tomas Necid smashed in a penalty in the 93rd minute to snatch a point. Analysis comes from Rio Ferdinand and Jurgen Klinsmann, with Steve Bower and Dion Dublin on commentary

programme.title: Landward
programme.desc: Dougie Vipond is in Sutherland to see why Forestry & Land Scotland (formerly the Forestry Commission) is pulling up trees and restoring peatland. Euan McIllwraith meets the author of the Scots Dictionary of Nature, the sparks are flying as JJ Chalmers tries a bit of blacksmithing, and Anne Lundon puts on her bee suit to visit the hives of a 'bee whisperer'

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Gastric spends the night at Madge's house, but has he found the path to her best bedroom? Granville takes delivery of a bargain consignment from Spain, not knowing exactly what is in the very large crate. Eric and Cyril have a fall out over a lost compass, while Mr Newbold falls in and gets a soaking on a boat trip with Mrs Rossi. The canny grocer has his work cut out getting friends to make up and getting a wet customer home without being spotted by 'Black Widow' Mrs Featherstone. Comedy, starring David Jason, Stephanie Cole, Tim Healy, Johnny Vegas and Sue Holderness

programme.title: River City
programme.desc: Caitlin and her family wait anxiously as her trial draws to a close, while Ellie is left heartbroken and Jac is devastated when she discovers the truth about Joe. Cameron lures Dylan even further into his vengeful plans for Eve

programme.desc: Peter Crouch, Maya Jama and Alex Horne delve in to at all the big Euro 2020 matches, including reaction to Scotland v England. programme.desc: England v Scotland. Highlights of the eagerly-anticipated Euro 2020 Group D fixture, which came from Wembley Stadium

programme.desc: England v Scotland. A chance to see the Group D fixture between the old rivals, which came from Wembley Stadium. programme.desc: Finland v Russia (Kick-off 2.00pm). Mark Chapman presents coverage of the Group B fixture, which takes place at Saint Petersburg Stadium. These countries have only met on four previous occasions, most recently in June 2009, when Russia recorded a straightforward 3-0 victory in a World Cup qualifier in Helsinki. programme.desc: Tom Allen, Geoff Norcott, Vicki Pepperdine and Esme Young join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory, through rounds including Home Truths and Quick-fire Lies

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is back as the British detective working on the Caribbean island of Saint Marie, where the sun shines all day and it seems half the residents are killers-in-waiting. And so it appears with the first case when a plantation owner ends up dead during a seance - although with the door firmly closed at the time and all the participants holding hands round the table, who did the deed? The victim's family are convinced it was the work of a ghost said to haunt the plantation, but Humphrey is determined to find a more rational explanation. Meanwhile, Fidel has moved on, leaving Officer Dwayne Myers holding the fort - and while he is struggling to cope, the last thing he needs is the Commissioner stepping in to help. Crime drama, with guest appearances from Holby City's Don Gilet and former Corrie bad girl Natalie Gumede

programme.title: Slighean Sgoile an t-Saoghail (Most Dangerous Ways to School)
programme.desc: Lake Titicaca, straddling the border between Peru and Bolivia in the Andes Mountains, is one of South America's largest lakes. Living here are the Uro - an ancient people, described at times as the only decedents of the Incas. They are the people of the floating islands, a very small community of about 2,000 with a community consisting of 50 swimming islands. Every day from the furthest corners, the youngest inhabitants paddle their way in their small boats to school

programme.desc: Following the activities of a 10-week-old polar bear being raised by his mother in the Canadian Arctic. programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Italy v Switzerland (Kick-off 8.00pm). Mark Pougatch presents coverage of the second Group A fixture for both sides, which takes place at Stadio Olimpico in Rome. Italy laid down a marker in the opening match of the tournament against Turkey, running out comfortable 3-0 winners, while Switzerland were held to a 1-1 draw by Wales. These near neighbours haven't played each other since June 2010, and this is their first-ever meeting at the European Championship finals. Switzerland's last victory over the Azzurri came back in May 1993, when Roy Hodgson masterminded a 1-0 World Cup qualifying win in Berne thanks to Marc Hottiger's second-half goal. It's fair to say that the Swiss have been drawn a difficult hand in this tournament, beginning their campaign against Wales in Azerbaijan, before travelling to Rome for this match, and then returning to Baku for their final group fixture against Turkey. Italy are coached by former Manchester City boss Roberto Mancini, who has used a number of pla

Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Ukraine v North Macedonia (Kick-off 2.00pm). Coverage of the Group C fixture, which takes place at National Arena Bucharest. These countries last met during qualifying for Euro 2016, with Ukraine coming out on top on both occasions, and both sides need a positive result after losing their opening fixtures. Ukraine fought back from 2-0 down against Netherlands before succumbing to a late goal and a 3-2 defeat, while North Macedonia were beaten 3-1 by Austria. While many of the Ukrainian squad will be relatively unfamiliar, they boast arguably their most famous sportsman as coach, and Andriy Shevchenko has enjoyed a relatively fruitful tenure to date. Presented by Seema Jaswal, with Emma Hayes, Robert Earnshaw and Scott Brown, and commentary by Joe Speight and John Hartson

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Denmark v Belgium (Kick-off 5.00pm). All the action from the Group B match, which takes place at Parken in Copenhagen. Belgium were impressive in their 3-0 victory over Russia on Saturday night, including two goals by striker Romelu Lukaku, but most of the attention so far in this group has centred on Denmark and events during their match against Finland. Christian Eriksen collapsed on the pitch during the first half, and when the match was restarted later in the afternoon, it was Finland who came out on top 1-0. These sides met in the group stages of the UEFA Nations League in September and November last year, with Belgium emerging victorious on both occasions. The fixture in this stadium in September finished 2-0, thanks to goals in each half from Jason Denayer and Dries Mertens. Mark Pougatch presents, with analysis from Ashley Cole, Nadia Nadim and Graeme Souness. Commentary is from Clive Tyldesley and Ally McCoist

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Italy v Switzerland (Kick-off 8.00pm). Mark Pougatch presents coverage of the second Group A fixture for both sides, which takes place at Stadio Olimpico in Rome. Italy laid down a marker in the opening match of the tournament against Turkey, running out comfortable 3-0 winners, while Switzerland were held to a 1-1 draw by Wales. These near neighbours haven't played each other since June 2010, and this is their first-ever meeting at the European Championship finals. Switzerland's last victory over the Azzurri came back in May 1993, when Roy Hodgson masterminded a 1-0 World Cup qualifying win in Berne thanks to Marc Hottiger's second-half goal. It's fair to say that the Swiss have been drawn a difficult hand in this tournament, beginning their campaign against Wales in Azerbaijan, before travelling to Rome for this match, and then returning to Baku for their final group fixture against Turkey. Italy are coached by former Manchester City boss Roberto Mancini, who has used a number of pla

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Bentham DeQuetteville falls to his death from a roof after seeing a headless horseman, his aristocratic family seem more concerned about their forthcoming Civil War re-enactment than the incident. As Barnaby and Jones try to discover the truth behind the ghostly figure, their investigation uncovers shocking secrets about the DeQuettevilles. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes, with James Callis, William Gaunt and Raquel Cassidy

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Cora's attempts at matchmaking are dashed when Mary is smitten not by intended target Evelyn Napier, but by his handsome friend, Turkish attache Kemal Pamuk. The couple's mutual attraction sparks a train of events whose consequences ripple through the entire household. Gwen is humiliated as her secret ambition is exposed, and Bates takes extreme action to cure his limp. Costume drama, starring Maggie Smith, Michelle Dockery, Brendan Patricks, Theo James, Rose Leslie and Elizabeth McGovern

programme.title: McDonald & Dodds
programme.desc: Mystery drama set in Bath, where the wildly ambitious DCI McDonald finds herself paired with the shy, modest DS Dodds, who has languished on the shelf for most of his working life. However, it soon turns out the unassuming sergeant has a hidden talent for puzzle solving. Their first case sees the pair looking into the shooting of a homeless man in the deserted mansion of local industrialist Max Crockett. The Crockett appear to be a close-knit group but it soon becomes clear they have secrets to hide. Jason Watkins and Tala Gouveia star as the detectives, with a guest appearance from Robert Lindsay

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle is enlisted as the police representative on the Victory Day Celebrations Committee, alongside his old friend John Kiefer representing the American forces stationed at Hastings. But a murder of one of their number puts paid to the preparations when evidence points to the guilt of another member, and investigations uncover truths the Allies would rather remain hidden. Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks star, with guest Jay Benedict

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: Melbourne warns Victoria that Parliament will not be happy about her marrying a German prince, a prediction that proves all too accurate when the Privy Council refuse to grant Albert a royal title. The prince fears for his future in England, while Victoria succumbs to paranoia, becoming convinced that he only intends to marry her for the financial independence he will gain

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: Albert feels he needs a greater role in public affairs, and becomes involved in the anti-slavery movement. Victoria matches wills with the Duke of Sussex to see that her husband is granted more respect, while Skerrett faces a dilemma when she realises that the only person who can save her cousin and child from certain death is the man she trusts the least

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Mollie Sugden as a hired-help who finds her long-lost son

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Kabin is ransacked after Rita leaves the keys in the lock. Alf warns Fred to keep away from Audrey, and Curly decides to dramatically change his image

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin does not understand why Sally has changed her mind. Toyah is thrilled when her letter is printed in Just 16 magazine, and Mike discovers Hayley's secret

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Ashley and Bernice have their work cut out on the camping trip. Kelly and Roy share their first breakfast in the cottage, and Liam tries to coax Zoe out for a drink

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Elsa is set to return to Australia but tells Kathy she will not give up on the custody claims, and Ashley wakes up next to Bernice on the camping trip

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick goes undercover to track down an escaped prisoner, Greengrass discovers a couple of naturists, and Auntie Eileen has a decision to make when she meets a face from her past. Rural police drama, starring Nick Berry, Bill Maynard and Derek Fowlds

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is determined to listen to classical music, but someone keeps interrupting. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Mr Roper plans to convert the flats into smaller dwelling units - but he has not bargained for Robin, Chrissy and Jo having a three-year lease. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle is enlisted as the police representative on the Victory Day Celebrations Committee, alongside his old friend John Kiefer representing the American forces stationed at Hastings. But a murder of one of their number puts paid to the preparations when evidence points to the guilt of another member, and investigations uncover truths the Allies would rather remain hidden. Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks star, with guest Jay Benedict

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A white Christmas plunges Aidensfield into chaos, with Nick stranded in Jo's cottage by heavy snow and Ventress caught in an awkward situation while wearing full Santa Claus gear. The police station is also invaded by Greengrass's geese - and a plane carrying a fugitive criminal and his pregnant wife crashes on the moors, leading to a desperate manhunt. Rural police drama, starring Nick Berry, Juliette Gruber, William Simons and Bill Maynard

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe thinks Chris is dead as she has not heard back from Liam. Bernice plans to set Tricia up with Richie, and Kathy comes to a decision about Alice's future

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy finds it difficult to control her emotions when Elsa arrives to collect Alice. Richie asks Tricia out to dinner

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma begs Mike not to tell anyone about Hayley. Kevin objects to Sally going out every night, while Natalie gives Sally her solicitor's bill and accuses her of hating Kevin

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally is annoyed when Kevin goes for a bank loan with the house as security. Alma is stunned when Roy accuses her of ruining Hayley's new life

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: An ancient Cornish folk ritual ends in the murder of a local undertaker - and provides quick-witted copper Charles Wycliffe with one of the most baffling mysteries of his career. Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters, Jimmy Yuill and Susan Penhaligon star

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A barrister is killed with a lethal dose of morphine and suspicion falls on ex-convict Grady Felton, who has recently returned to the village where he committed murder years earlier. However, he has a strong alibi and Barnaby thinks he must be working with an accomplice - until Grady himself is targeted in an arson attack. Detective drama, guest starring Sharon Duce, with Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The fair arrives in the village and Mrs Hughes finds herself the centre of speculation when she meets a former suitor who makes her question her position at Downton. Meanwhile, Violet and Isobel lock horns over a medical ailment affecting Molesley, and Carson fears there is a thief at work in the grounds. Costume drama, starring Maggie Smith, Hugh Bonneville, Phyllis Logan, Penelope Wilton, Jim Carter and Kevin Doyle

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective is called to the University of Northumberland when Jamie Marshall, a promising young journalism student, falls to his death from the top of a disused faculty building. With no eyewitnesses and no immediate leads, Vera turns to friends and family to glean all she can about Jamie, and to discover who might have wanted him dead. The student's innocent facade is revealed to have concealed simmering resentment and anger which he expressed on the internet - and which may have made him some deadly enemies

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: It is July 1945 and, as Britain settles into peacetime, Foyle looks forward to retirement, but finds his life in turmoil once more when Samantha's employer Sir Leonard Spencer-Jones is found dead. Suspicion falls on Niko, a Russian PoW, who flees the Sussex coast and heads for a sanctuary in London - closely followed by Foyle, who has been sent to track him down by the War Office. But the investigation soon brings to light a conspiracy and an international cover-up which, if exposed, could bring down the British government. Max Brown joins the cast, with Michael Kitchen, Honeysuckle Weeks, Anthony Howell, Eleanor Bron and Christopher Good

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: The queen becomes pregnant, and declares that Albert will become head of state in the event of her death. The developments outrage members of the Tory party, who fear a German prince holding sway over the nation and make arrangements to disrupt his visit to the industrial north. The consort finds an unlikely ally in Sir Robert Peel, who seeks royal approval for the rapidly developing railway. At first, Victoria does not approve, but soon changes her mind when she experiences Peel's creation for herself

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: The queen is heavily pregnant, but defies her mother and husband when they try to keep her confined to the palace - while the Duke of Cumberland sees political advantage to be gained should Victoria die in childbirth. During a public appearance by Victoria and Albert, a man in the crowd tries to assassinate her, setting in motion a number of conspiracy theories. Skerett receives an offer from Francatelli to join him in his new establishment

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.desc: Alma begs Mike not to tell anyone about Hayley. Kevin objects to Sally going out every night, while Natalie gives Sally her solicitor's bill and accuses her of hating Kevin

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid wants a lie-in, but it is doomed from the beginning as Sally chases romance and Jean goes on a diet. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy takes over Robin's poker game when he is rushed into hospital. Unfortunately, she does not fully understand the rules and puts the rent money at risk. Comedy, with Paula Wilcox and Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: It is July 1945 and, as Britain settles into peacetime, Foyle looks forward to retirement, but finds his life in turmoil once more when Samantha's employer Sir Leonard Spencer-Jones is found dead. Suspicion falls on Niko, a Russian PoW, who flees the Sussex coast and heads for a sanctuary in London - closely followed by Foyle, who has been sent to track him down by the War Office. But the investigation soon brings to light a conspiracy and an international cover-up which, if exposed, could bring down the British government. Max Brown joins the cast, with Michael Kitchen, Honeysuckle Weeks, Anthony Howell, Eleanor Bron and Christopher Good

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick and Jo buy an engagement ring, but receive a hostile response to their news from her mother. Greengrass angers Blaketon by standing bail for a burglar. Rural drama, starring Nick Berry, Juliette Gruber and Bill Maynard

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Roy's dinner party is a disaster and the owner of the cottage phones the police, while Liam enjoys a drink with Zoe

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe grows more suspicious of Liam, Roy prepares for court, and Richie turns down Tricia's offer of a date

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ida threatens Mike with industrial action if he does not reinstate Hayley. Hayley is amazed that people are prepared to strike over her, and Greg has some home truths for Maxine

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maxine tells Sally she has finished with Greg. Curly tells Toyah he was hurt by her article, and Kevin tells Sally he cannot cope with her hostility

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The discovery of a body at a ramshackle farm alerts Wycliffe to the fact that a murderer is at large in a sleepy Cornish village - and when two locals disappear, he realises it will take all his deductive powers to solve the mystery. Whodunit, starring Jack Shepherd and Helen Masters

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: As darkness covers Midsomer Stanton during a total eclipse of the sun, Jeremy Harper is killed by a blow to the head with a meteorite. The victim was a leading light in the village - an amateur astronomer who was passionate about preserving Moonstone Ridge, a Bronze Age heritage site housing a 1930s observatory. Barnaby and Jones are called in to investigate, and the duo discover that intrigue, sexual tension and academic rivalry are rife among the local stargazing community. Murder mystery, guest starring Maureen Lipman and Kenny Ireland, with Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: As the village prepares for the annual flower show, Isobel finds herself in conflict with Violet, and Mary is introduced to a potential suitor, but it would seem she only has eyes for Matthew. Anna realises who is to blame when a valuable snuff box goes missing, and Mrs Patmore tearfully reveals her fears to Carson that her career may be coming to an end. Meanwhile, O'Brien engineers a way for Edith to take revenge on Mary. Drama, starring Maggie Smith and Robert Bathurst

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The doctor becomes convinced something is wrong with him following a conversation with his mother, and Louisa's attempts at getting him to open up about the loss of his father prove futile. Mrs Tishell goes to the surgery for advice regarding a pain in her jaw, only to find herself falling in love with Martin all over again. Elsewhere, Al receives a visit from two military policemen who are trying to track down Mike Pruddy

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa decides to leave for Spain with baby James and says an awkward goodbye to Martin, but when he finds the scan of her brain, he spots a malformation and realises she could suffer a haemorrhage if she gets on the plane. Will the doctor make it to the airport in time? Meanwhile, Margaret reveals the real reason she has come to Portwenn, and disaster strikes at Bert and Jennifer's engagement party when Caroline receives an electric shock

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Racial tensions erupt in Hastings when a black GI is suspected of murdering a local woman. The victim, an ex-lover of the suspect and the mother of his baby, was staying at a guest house where Samantha is assistant manager, and had been disowned by her family because of her mixed-race child. As Foyle investigates, he is not convinced the soldier could be capable of such a crime, and soon comes up against the might of the US Army as he tries to crack the case. Starring Michael Kitchen, Honeysuckle Weeks, Obi Abili and Charlotte Riley

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: The second series of the drama about the early years of Queen Victoria's reign begins after the birth of her first child. She resumes her royal duties sooner than expected, and quickly becomes convinced that her husband and the prime minister are concealing troubling news about the conflict in Afghanistan, and turns to the Duke of Wellington for answers. Victoria also faces problems at home, as Albert's family descend on the palace for the christening with plans for the future. Diana Rigg joins the cast as the queen's new confidante, the formidable Duchess of Buccleuch

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: The queen suspects that her husband is attracted to another woman, and discovers that she is pregnant with a second child - leaving her concerned that motherhood will dominate her life and reign, at the expense of any other possibilities. Below stairs, new dresser Cleary thinks that the palace is haunted, but Brodie believes there is a natural explanation for the events that have frightened her

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.desc: Sally does not know how to tell Kevin she has changed her mind about the garage. Curly receives an unwanted letter from Raquel, and Rita panics when she cannot catch her breath

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alec insists to Rita that she sees a doctor. Spider and Lorraine decide to throw a party while Emily's away, and Audrey enjoys Fred's attention and goes to dinner with him

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Everything seems to be going to plan for Liam until Zoe demands proof that her brother is alive. Elsa confronts Kathy about her attitude

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Turner tells Elsa and Kathy they must put Alice first. Jack argues with Sarah over the boys helping out on the farm, and Mandy's spending spree sends Kelly into a fit of jealousy

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Maggie, George and Ventress all become victims of poison pen letters, but when Nick investigates, it appears not everyone is admitting to receiving them

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid's new neighbours are offended by Mike's latest sculpture. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy discovers she has an admirer, while Mr Roper thinks his wife is seeing someone else. Comedy series, with Richard O'Sullivan and Brian Murphy

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: When an unpopular employee at a military psychiatric hospital is found murdered, there is no shortage of suspects, but a colleague of the man, an exiled Polish Jew, holds himself responsible for the death. Foyle is convinced there is another explanation, but his priorities shift when news of a missing boy from London reaches Hastings. Starring Michael Kitchen, Phyllida Law and Nicholas Woodeson

programme.desc: Nick and Jo buy an engagement ring, but receive a hostile response to their news from her mother. Greengrass angers Blaketon by standing bail for a burglar. Rural drama, starring Nick Berry, Juliette Gruber and Bill Maynard

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Roy's dinner party is a disaster and the owner of the cottage phones the police, while Liam enjoys a drink with Zoe

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe grows more suspicious of Liam, Roy prepares for court, and Richie turns down Tricia's offer of a date

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ida threatens Mike with industrial action if he does not reinstate Hayley. Hayley is amazed that people are prepared to strike over her, and Greg has some home truths for Maxine

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maxine tells Sally she has finished with Greg. Curly tells Toyah he was hurt by her article, and Kevin tells Sally he cannot cope with her hostility

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The discovery of a body at a ramshackle farm alerts Wycliffe to the fact that a murderer is at large in a sleepy Cornish village - and when two locals disappear, he realises it will take all his deductive powers to solve the mystery. Whodunit, starring Jack Shepherd and Helen Masters

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: As darkness covers Midsomer Stanton during a total eclipse of the sun, Jeremy Harper is killed by a blow to the head with a meteorite. The victim was a leading light in the village - an amateur astronomer who was passionate about preserving Moonstone Ridge, a Bronze Age heritage site housing a 1930s observatory. Barnaby and Jones are called in to investigate, and the duo discover that intrigue, sexual tension and academic rivalry are rife among the local stargazing community. Murder mystery, guest starring Maureen Lipman and Kenny Ireland, with Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: As the village prepares for the annual flower show, Isobel finds herself in conflict with Violet, and Mary is introduced to a potential suitor, but it would seem she only has eyes for Matthew. Anna realises who is to blame when a valuable snuff box goes missing, and Mrs Patmore tearfully reveals her fears to Carson that her career may be coming to an end. Meanwhile, O'Brien engineers a way for Edith to take revenge on Mary. Drama, starring Maggie Smith and Robert Bathurst

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The doctor becomes convinced something is wrong with him following a conversation with his mother, and Louisa's attempts at getting him to open up about the loss of his father prove futile. Mrs Tishell goes to the surgery for advice regarding a pain in her jaw, only to find herself falling in love with Martin all over again. Elsewhere, Al receives a visit from two military policemen who are trying to track down Mike Pruddy

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa decides to leave for Spain with baby James and says an awkward goodbye to Martin, but when he finds the scan of her brain, he spots a malformation and realises she could suffer a haemorrhage if she gets on the plane. Will the doctor make it to the airport in time? Meanwhile, Margaret reveals the real reason she has come to Portwenn, and disaster strikes at Bert and Jennifer's engagement party when Caroline receives an electric shock

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Racial tensions erupt in Hastings when a black GI is suspected of murdering a local woman. The victim, an ex-lover of the suspect and the mother of his baby, was staying at a guest house where Samantha is assistant manager, and had been disowned by her family because of her mixed-race child. As Foyle investigates, he is not convinced the soldier could be capable of such a crime, and soon comes up against the might of the US Army as he tries to crack the case. Starring Michael Kitchen, Honeysuckle Weeks, Obi Abili and Charlotte Riley

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: The second series of the drama about the early years of Queen Victoria's reign begins after the birth of her first child. She resumes her royal duties sooner than expected, and quickly becomes convinced that her husband and the prime minister are concealing troubling news about the conflict in Afghanistan, and turns to the Duke of Wellington for answers. Victoria also faces problems at home, as Albert's family descend on the palace for the christening with plans for the future. Diana Rigg joins the cast as the queen's new confidante, the formidable Duchess of Buccleuch

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: The queen suspects that her husband is attracted to another woman, and discovers that she is pregnant with a second child - leaving her concerned that motherhood will dominate her life and reign, at the expense of any other possibilities. Below stairs, new dresser Cleary thinks that the palace is haunted, but Brodie believes there is a natural explanation for the events that have frightened her

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: The trio race against time to find a World War Two bomb in a bid to stop it falling into the hands of a neo-Nazi group keen to launch another battle. Fantasy drama, starring William Gaunt, Alexandra Bastedo and Stuart Damon

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The mystery surrounding a legendary racehorse's disappearance is solved with the help of one of the most famous clues in the Holmes canon - 'the curious incident of the dog in the night-time'. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel infiltrate an international conference at which the delegates have begun acting strangely - by predicting their own deaths. Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg star, with Clifford Evans, William Lucas and Allan Cuthbertson

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli Bell, Francesca Cumani, Matt Chapman and Adele Mulrennan look ahead to the second day of Royal Ascot

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur excludes Terry from his latest business venture, prompting him to embark on a search for alternative employment. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar investigates allegations that the Loch Ness monster not only exists, but is also responsible for a mysterious spate of killings in Scotland. Fulton Mackay guest stars alongside Roger Moore

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan encounters a former nemesis at a party, who drunkenly admits involvement in an earlier robbery in which he was let go due to lack of evidence. He disapproves of his daughter's villainous boyfriend, and Regan suspects he is being exploited to help break the romantic union. However, an even darker plan is being hatched, with the daughter an innocent pawn in a robbery. Kenny Lynch and Derek Francis guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A houseguest wakes up in dilapidated Wisteria Lodge to find that his host and all the household servants have vanished. Understandably perplexed, he heads straight for Baker Street and asks Holmes to solve the mystery of their disappearance. Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke star

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: The death of a ventriloquist leads to the discovery that he was carrying a collection of gems in his stomach. Meanwhile, Steed resorts to blackmail and Emma embarks on a mission in the business community

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 investigates the fatal shooting of a South American president's son at a polo match, and finds that the victim's step-sister is unknowingly dating one of the terrorists involved. Ruby Wax and Pierce Brosnan feature in early screen appearances, alongside stars Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: An ex-footballer persuades Arthur to buy 2,000 tickets for an England v Scotland football match. However, trouble ensues once it becomes apparent they are forgeries. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of the concluding race on the second day of the festival - the 6.10 Kensington Palace Stakes, plus a round-up of all the day's racing. With commentary by Richard Hoiles and Mark Johnson

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A look back at memorable stagings of the race from Epsom Downs. Featuring brilliant performances from Shergar to Sea The Stars, plus interviews with personalities from the worlds of sport and entertainment

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as rugby player Shane Williams, Coronation Street's Sair Khan, comedian Milton Jones and former Paralympic athlete Tanni Grey-Thompson pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: King of the Roads
programme.desc: The Spring Cup. Action from the event at Oliver's Mount Circuit in Scarborough. After it was cancelled in 2020 due to the pandemic, this year it opens the road racing calendar

programme.title: Gordon, Gino and Fred: American Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay, Gino D'Acampo and Fred Sirieix head to San Francisco, the free-spirited capital of the United States. They start out by sampling the latest trends of using cannabis in cooking, which was legalised in California in 2018 - but as they enjoy a hippy afternoon tea, Gino overindulges and chaos ensues, especially when the next activity on the agenda is a session of goat yoga. Moving on, the trio dig for clams on the Pacific coast, take a hot-air ride to a vineyard and visit a factory in Chinatown where fortune cookies are made. It seems a competition is in order and so the travel companions see who can make the most cookies in 60 seconds

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: FBI agent Sean Archer captures terrorist Castor Troy, the man who killed his son. While Troy is in a coma, Archer has the crook's face surgically grafted onto his own so he can go undercover and locate a bomb planted somewhere in Los Angeles. But then Troy regains consciousness - and in turn takes on Archer's identity. John Woo's action thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, John Travolta, Joan Allen, Gina Gershon and Dominique Swain

programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of the third day, where the 4.15 Ascot Gold Cup is the feature, and races also take place at 2.30, 3.05, 3.40, 5.00, 5.35 and 6.10. With analysis from Jason Weaver and Kevin Blake, reports by Rishi Persad, Matt Chapman, Luke Harvey and Adele Mulrennan, race commentary from Richard Hoiles and Mark Johnson, lifestyle with Mark Heyes and Charlotte Hawkins, and social stable from Oli Bell and Chris Hughes

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood delves into the ITV Sport archives to take a look back at James Hunt, Barry Sheene and a spectacular crash by Kelvin Burt

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Nina Wadia, Linford Christie, Sarah Harding and Tyger Drew-Honey pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: King of the Roads
programme.desc: The Spring Cup. Further action from the opening meeting of the campaign at Oliver's Mount Circuit in Scarborough

programme.title: Gordon, Gino and Fred: American Road Trip
programme.desc: For the final leg of their US jaunt, the trio arrive in Texas, a meat-lover's paradise where Gordon Ramsay is keen to introduce his companions to some of the best barbecue food known to man. In Lexington, Gordon turns lumberjack in an attempt to fell a dead oak - which is used to infuse ovens with wood smoke. There's a break for a bit of skinny dipping, before the trio fish go fishing, and stay in a strange cabin deep in the woods, surviving on beans and bourbon. They then hit the state capital of Austin, dressing as cowboys in the local bar and at the rodeo, before one last barbecue supper of slow-smoked beef brisket, pork ribs and spicy sausage

programme.title: Lucy (2014)
programme.desc: A courier is kidnapped and forced to become a drug mule. When she is exposed to the experimental chemicals she is smuggling, it boosts her intelligence and reflexes to superhuman levels. She uses her newfound abilities to get revenge on her captors, but as the process continues, she evolves into something more than human. Sci-fi thriller, starring Scarlett Johansson and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Highlights
programme.desc: Reshmin Chowdhury introduces action from Denmark v Belgium, Netherlands v Austria and Ukraine v North Macedonia, as the nations all played their second group fixtures. Plus, a look ahead to England v Scotland. Andros Townsend and Eni Aluko provide the expert opinion, with commentary by Clive Tyldesley, Joe Speight and Seb Hutchinson

programme.title: Euro 96 Relived
programme.desc: Scotland v England. A full re-run of the Group A encounter at Wembley Stadium. Both sides were looking for a first victory in the competition after drawing their openers against the Netherlands and Switzerland respectively, and it was Paul Gascoigne who stole the headlines with a famous goal. Jim Rosenthal presented the coverage, with pre-match analysis from Alex Ferguson and Jack Charlton

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Crusty senior diplomat Mycroft Holmes enlists the help of his more famous younger brother Sherlock to recover missing submarine plans vital to national security. Guest starring Charles Gray

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel track down a blackmailing assassin who scares his victims into meek compliance by carrying out fake murders. Vintage hokum, with Patrick Macnee, Diana Rigg and Simon Oates

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's schoolteacher girlfriend seeks CI5's assistance to quash a drug-smuggling ring after learning a 14-year-old pupil is involved having used then hidden a discarded firearm. The body count soon increases at an alarming rate as potential witnesses to a crime are killed off by the ruthless gang. Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Celia Gregory star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A wealthy family insists Dr Sudbury, a hypnotist friend of Arthur's, has mesmerised its teenage daughter Rita into agreeing to marry him. Arthur finds himself immersed in the fracas, while simultaneously trying to take over the affairs of a steam-cleaning business. Light-hearted drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of the concluding race on the fourth day of the festival - the 6.10 Palace of Holyroodhouse Handicap, plus a round-up of all the day's racing. With commentary by Richard Hoiles and Mark Johnson

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin introduces some of the great racehorses of the modern era, including Nijinsky, Tiger Roll, Best Mate, Desert Orchid and Shergar

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Mikey North, Una Healy, Carl Froch and Alison Hammond pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: The documentary going behind the scenes of the London airport returns for a fifth season. Inside the terminal, seasoned pro Demi dishes out deals for delayed passengers, while outside on the airfield, Ian is on the runway as it goes into lockdown with a full armed police presence. For the first time this series, viewers will also see the work of the Border Force's canine drugs detection team - Rachel and her dog Cole, who in his career has intercepted more than £1million worth of class-A contraband. Narrated by Julie Walters

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport. Staff at Heathrow airport contend with drunken passengers, drugs and drones, while Sue and Demi deal with an extra load of passengers after a closure at Gatwick airport. Elsewhere, Border Force officer Bob returns to the job, working to protect Britain's biggest border

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade responds to reports from one of the US east coast's most popular vacation destinations, the sunny Florida Keys. A creature is attacking both visitors and locals alike, striking its victims so violently it is slicing open flesh and even smashing bones, and the assaults are happening both above and below the water. Jeremy is determined to discover the identity of the assailant and uncover what is triggering these attacks. He knows it is not going to be easy, and it is not long before the intrepid marine biologist fears he may be out of his depth

programme.title: Under Siege (1992)
programme.desc: Terrorists infiltrate a US battleship in a carefully orchestrated move to steal its arsenal of nuclear weapons, unaware the ship's resourceful cook - a veteran US Navy Seal - and a scantily clad stripper are about to foil their plans. Action adventure, starring Steven Seagal, Erika Eleniak, Gary Busey and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.desc: For the final leg of their US jaunt, the trio arrive in Texas, a meat-lover's paradise where Gordon Ramsay is keen to introduce his companions to some of the best barbecue food known to man. In Lexington, Gordon turns lumberjack in an attempt to fell a dead oak - which is used to infuse ovens with wood smoke. There's a break for a bit of skinny dipping, before the trio fish go fishing, and stay in a strange cabin deep in the woods, surviving on beans and bourbon. They then hit the state capital of Austin, dressing as cowboys in the local bar and at the rodeo, before one last barbecue supper of slow-smoked beef brisket, pork ribs and spicy sausage

Crime thriller, starring Lesley Sharp and Patrick Gibson

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox and criminologist Professor David Wilson investigate famous unsolved murder cases, continuing with the disappearance of Suzy Lamplugh. The estate agent vanished after making an appointment with a client in July 1986. Despite the high profile of the case, nobody has ever been charged with Lamplugh's abduction and murder. Following a series of tantalising clues, Emilia and David narrow the field of suspects down to just one man. Will he reveal the truth?

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Over the past two decades, more than half a million Eritreans have fled their home in eastern Africa, escaping one of the most repressive and secretive dictatorships in the world. Reporting in Eritrea is almost impossible but for more than five years, Evan Williams has been gathering secretly shot footage from inside the country and interviewing some of those who have escaped. Here he documents allegations of torture, arbitrary detention and indefinite forced conscription into military service

programme.title: 21 Day Body Turnaround with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: The journalist and doctor asks five people to put their lives in his hands as he attempts to turn their health around in just 21 days. As the volunteers enter the last week of the experiment, Michael explores how alterations to eating patterns and exercise can do wonders for stress levels. He helps the group members explore their inner motivation before they tackle the final fitness challenge. He also reveals to them how far they've come in 21 days - with some astonishing results

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: On the first night in Hampshire, Serbian Stevan and his wife Clare serve up authentic Eastern European cuisine. Joining them to sample the delights of pickled cabbage are young students Josh and Bettie, while well-heeled James and Victoria bring a discerning eye to proceedings. On day two, youngsters Bettie and Josh are out to prove that there's more to student cooking than beans on toast. Finally, James and Victoria have chosen a menu themed around their favourite holiday destination of Spain

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job as an estate agent, but her honesty with potential buyers costs her lucrative sales and gets her into hot water with the boss, who issues an ultimatum. The Flanders agree to buy one of the agency's houses - unaware of the property's gruesome past

programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: The brides and grooms defying the jihadist militants laying siege to the city of Maiduguri in Nigeria, spiritual home of Boko Haram, a terrorist group at the centre of an insurgency that has killed over 36,000 people and displaced more than two million. With Covid lockdowns over and the militants driven out to north-eastern Nigeria, Yousra Elbagir discovers a city determined to reclaim the joy of weddings despite the ongoing risk of kidnappings and attacks. The reporter hears stories of loss and desperation, but also meets the residents determined to repair mental scars and rebuild Maiduguri for its people

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Part one of two. Veteran actors and married couple Prunella Scales and Timothy West pass the tiller to Sheila Hancock and Gyles Brandreth, who are celebrating 40 years of friendship by making new memories together and learning new skills. Sheila and Gyles learn the ropes with Tim, and set out by themselves along the upper reaches of the River Thames. It's the same river that roars past their homes in London, but just 50 miles upstream it's an Arcadian paradise of unspoiled nature, royal retreats and river regattas

programme.title: Royals Declassified
programme.desc: Recently declassified documents reveal an unseen side to the Queen and Prince Philip, exploring the key personal events that have shaped their public and family lives. The programme examines the end of Philip's high-flying naval career and clashes with the palace old guard, Princess Margaret's turbulent love life, and Prince Charles being bullied at school, and questions the personal price the Queen paid in her approach to each fresh challenge

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox

programme.desc: Documentary series charting the story of Britain's biggest retailer, from its origins on a market stall to the supermarket giant it has become today. programme.desc: The focus shifts to store cupboard ingredients, assessing how people can shop healthily and spend less when it comes to jars, cans and packets. programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: Kate Williams reveals behind-the-scenes tales of the British monarchy's residences, with contributions by royal commentators and ex-staff members, who give the lowdown on the stories that have shaped the modern royal family. Kate begins with Buckingham Palace, which the brainchild of George IV, who hired architect John Nash to turn modest Buckingham House into a palace on a grand European scale

programme.title: Summer on the Farm
programme.desc: With so many village fetes cancelled last year and just a few planned across the country this year, the Nicholsons are staging a socially distanced summer fete for their staff and families. Peter Wright from The Yorkshire Vet and JB Gill be live at the farm and the programme will follow farmer Ruth from Cannon Hall Farm as she goes to 'heavy horse boot camp' in preparation for this year's Great Yorkshire Show

programme.title: Great Paintings of the World with Andrew Marr
programme.desc: The stories behind The Hay Wain by John Constable, tone of the most famous paintings of the English countryside ever created, delving into what the it really represents. This seemingly simple, bucolic scene may look idyllic, but this canvas is really about one man's obstinate refusal to conform, a yearning for acceptance by his peers, family tragedy, and a blinkered refusal to see the harsh realities of rural life in early 19th-century England. As Constable's story heads to Paris, Andrew explains how this simple British scene would ultimately inspire a group of Frenchmen to give the world Impressionism

programme.title: Braveheart (1995)
programme.desc: Account of the life of medieval Scottish hero William Wallace. After the slaughter of his father and brother, young Wallace is taken in by his uncle, who teaches him how to use not only his brawn but his brain - which he employs to great effect years later when he resolves to drive the English out of Scotland. Oscar-winning historical epic, directed by and starring Mel Gibson. With Patrick McGoohan, Sophie Marceau and Catherine McCormack

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon gives a 170-year-old mansion in Fermoy some modern touches, including a luxurious extension complete with a swim spa, gym and sauna

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice helps a Staffordshire couple sell their three-bedroom house in Newcastle-under-Lyme by clearing clutter and creating more space. Her efforts pay off, and with fresher shades on the walls and a laminated floor, they soon find a buyer for the property

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Dr Paul Binski investigates places of worship designed by Christopher Wren after the Great Fire of London in 1666. Assigned to rebuild 51 of the city's churches, he created a trademark open, auditorium-style feel to emphasise the shift from Catholic to Anglican dominance

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: A decision is made about a badger cub, the first baby owls of the season arrive, and a frog loses its feet

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go on a walk through the forest to Grandpa and Granny Pig's house

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas takes a shortcut via a low bridge and knocks the water wheel he is carrying off his flatbed and sends it rolling across the Chinese countryside

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When Ms Marjorie takes her mobile library to the mountains, Maynard accidentally releases the brake

programme.title: My Man Godfrey (1936)
programme.desc: A spoiled aristocratic woman hires a tramp as her butler, little anticipating how valuable he will prove _ or what effect his charms will have on her. Classic comedy, starring William Powell, Carole Lombard and Alice Brady

programme.title: Rawhide (1951)
programme.desc: Outlaws hold staff and a passenger and her baby hostage at a remote stagecoach station while awaiting the arrival of a shipment of $100,000 in gold bullion. The nervous captives try to stay calm, but the tension between the gang leader and a jumpy henchman grows fraught, ending in a frantic shoot-out - with the infant in the thick of the fray. Western, starring Tyrone Power, Susan Hayward and Jack Elam

programme.title: Red Mountain (1951)
programme.desc: A Confederate captain sets out to join forces with notorious guerilla militia Quantrill's Raiders, but stops off en route to rescue a man from being lynched for a murder he himself committed - and complicates matters by falling for his fiancee. Western set during the American Civil War, starring Alan Ladd and Lizabeth Scott

programme.title: The Man Who Would Be King (1975)
programme.desc: Two British soldiers in 19th-century India travel to an unexplored land, where one of them fools the natives into believing he is a god. However, his growing delusions of grandeur put him at loggerheads with his comrade-in-arms. Adventure based on the Rudyard Kipling story, directed by John Huston, starring Sean Connery, Michael Caine, Saeed Jaffrey, Christopher Plummer and Shakira Caine

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still (2008)
programme.desc: An alien arrives on Earth, accompanied by an awesomely powerful robot, on a fateful mission - to decide if the human race deserves to continue - and if not, to wipe it out. The visitor is imprisoned in a military facility, but a scientist helps him escape, hoping to prove that mankind is worth saving. Sci-fi drama remake, starring Keanu Reeves and Jennifer Connelly

programme.title: Hancock (2008)
programme.desc: A reluctant, alcoholic superhero ends up the most hated man in Los Angeles thanks to his habit of causing mayhem and destruction while trying to do good. However, when he saves the life of a PR guru, the grateful executive sets about transforming the public perception of the crime-fighter, despite his wife's strong misgivings. Comedy, starring Will Smith, Jason Bateman and Charlize Theron

programme.title: Hunt for the Wilderpeople (2016)
programme.desc: A 12-year-old brought up in the city is sent to be fostered by the good-natured Bella and her grumpy husband Hec, who live on a farm in rural New Zealand. When tragedy strikes. Ricky runs off into the wilderness, pursued by Hec - inadvertently sparking a national manhunt for the two of them. Comedy adventure written and directed by Taika Waititi, starring Sam Neill and Julian Dennison

programme.title: Child 44 (2015)
programme.desc: A secret police agent in 1950s Russia is disgraced for refusing to denounce his own wife as a traitor. Reassigned to a remote outpost, he tries to bring a serial child murderer to justice, but faces an official cover-up by a rival, who wants to maintain the illusion that Soviet society is without crime. Detective thriller based on Tom Rob Smith's novel, starring Tom Hardy, Gary Oldman and Noomi Rapace

programme.title: The File on Thelma Jordon (1950)
programme.desc: An assistant district attorney falls for a woman suspected of murdering her aunt, so he covers up evidence that may incriminate her as he attempts to get her acquitted. Film noir, starring Barbara Stanwyck and Wendell Corey

programme.title: Freedom Radio (1940)
programme.desc: A Viennese doctor tries to maintain business as usual while living under Nazi rule. However, events take a sickening turn when his wife begins wholeheartedly espousing Hitler's views - prompting him to start broadcasting Allied propaganda from a secret transmitter. Second World War drama, starring Clive Brook, Diana Wynyard, Raymond Huntley and Derek Farr

programme.title: Death Drums Along the River (1963)
programme.desc: A British inspector is called to Africa to investigate the murder of a fellow policeman and uncovers a diamond-smuggling operation seemingly connected to an upriver hospital. Mystery, based on Edgar Wallace's novel Sanders on the River, starring Richard Todd, Marianne Koch, Albert Lieven and Walter Rilla

programme.title: Kidnapped (1971)
programme.desc: A naive young man is cheated out of his inheritance by his conniving uncle, who sells him to the captain of a slave ship. On board he forms an alliance with a hardened rebel, and the pair make their escape when the ship is wrecked on the Scottish coast. Period adventure based on Robert Louis Stevenson's novel set during the Jacobite Uprising, with Michael Caine, Lawrence Douglas, Trevor Howard, Jack Hawkins and Donald Pleasence

programme.title: WarGames (1983)
programme.desc: A teenager hacks into a top-secret military supercomputer, which challenges him to what he thinks is a game. However, the machine has complete control of the US nuclear arsenal, and the youngster's actions are unwittingly pushing the world to the brink of war. Thriller, starring Matthew Broderick, Ally Sheedy, Dabney Coleman and John Wood

programme.title: Bad Times at the El Royale (2018)
programme.desc: In the late 1960s, several strangers, many with a secret to bury, meet by chance at a rundown Lake Tahoe's hotel with a dark past. During the course of one night, everyone will show their true colours. Director Drew Goddard's mystery thriller, starring Jeff Bridges, Cynthia Erivo and Dakota Johnson

programme.title: Green Room (2015)
programme.desc: A crooked club owner holds the members of a punk band captive after they witness the fatal stabbing of a woman committed by his henchmen. This sparks a gory fight for survival for the Ain't Rights and the dead woman's friend. Thriller, starring Anton Yelchin and Patrick Stewart

programme.title: Runners (1983)
programme.desc: A father refuses to accept his missing daughter is dead and vows to track her down, but the facts behind her disappearance prove difficult to uncover. Drama, starring Jane Asher, James Fox, Kate Hardie and Paul Angelis

programme.title: 12 Angry Men (1957)
programme.desc: Twelve jurors convene to decide the verdict in a murder trial. While 11 of the group are thoroughly convinced the teenage defendant is guilty, one lone voice of reason refuses to cave in to pressure and passionately argues the case for his innocence. Sidney Lumet's legal drama, starring Henry Fonda, Lee J Cobb, Ed Begley, Martin Balsam and Jack Klugman

programme.title: Legend of the Lost (1957)
programme.desc: A grizzled adventurer living in Timbuktu is hired to escort a mysterious explorer across the Sahara desert in search of a fabled lost city. A local woman joins the men on their quest, but when the trio reach their destination the explorer reveals his plan to betray his companions and leave them high and dry. Adventure, starring John Wayne, Sophia Loren and Rossano Brazzi

programme.title: The Day Will Dawn (1942)
programme.desc: A foreign correspondent working in occupied Norway is assigned to an RAF detail helping freedom fighters to sabotage an important German U-boat installation. He enlists the help of a local sea captain's daughter, but the plan goes wrong and he ends up in enemy hands, facing death by firing squad. Second World War adventure, with Hugh Williams, Deborah Kerr and Ralph Richardson

programme.title: The 39 Steps (1959)
programme.desc: An innocent man becomes embroiled in international espionage as he tries to uncover the meaning behind the cryptic last words of a mystery woman, whom he knew for only a brief time before finding her dying in his flat. He must flee for his life from foreign spies and the police, who think he is a murderer. Spy thriller based on John Buchan's novel, starring Kenneth More, Taina Elg, Barry Jones and James Hayter

programme.title: Jumper (2008)
programme.desc: A man discovers he has the ability to teleport, a talent he cleverly exploits to rob banks undetected while living a life of luxury all over the world. However, he soon learns he is not the only one with this power - and that a secret society of religious fanatics is determined to wipe out him and all of his kind. Fantasy thriller, with Hayden Christensen, Jamie Bell and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Bone Collector (1999)
programme.desc: A quadriplegic ex-cop is saved from the brink of suicide by a rookie female officer needing his expertise to form a psychological profile of a serial killer. The murderer is posing as a cab driver and terrorising Manhattan, and has a gruesome habit of taking trophies from his victims' bodies. Thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Angelina Jolie, Michael Rooker, Mike McGlone, Luis Guzman and Queen Latifah

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage (2017)
programme.desc: The extreme sports-loving super spy is brought out of exile when a lethal gang of mercenaries steal a powerful new weapon that threatens the safety of the entire world. He must assemble his own team of adrenaline junkie agents to recover the lethal device. Action thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Donnie Yen, Toni Collette and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Our Kind of Traitor (2016)
programme.desc: A couple are thrown into the murky world of espionage when they befriend a Russian money launderer, who asks them to smuggle classified information to the British secret services. The favour leads them on a perilous journey across Europe, with the Russian Mafia closing in on them. Spy thriller based on John le Carre's novel, starring Ewan McGregor and Naomie Harris

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: Scrubs
